mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, role, created_at AS createdAt FROM users
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
display_name = #{req.displayName}, role = #{req.role},
password_hash = #{req.password},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, `role` AS role, created_at AS createdAt FROM users
login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
`role` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND created_at >= #{startDate}
AND created_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
